To set up an automated calling system, you would typically need to use a software or service that supports automated calling, such as a robocaller service or a VoIP provider. You would also need to have a list of phone numbers and the recorded audio file. Then, you would configure the system to dial the numbers and play the message. It is important to pay attention to the tone and delivery of the message, as a calm and professional tone can be more convincing. Additionally, you may want to include a call to action, such as a phone number for people to call. Finally, ensure that you follow all applicable laws and regulations regarding automated calling, such as the Telephone Consumer Protection Act (TCPA).
